title: leucanthemum auriculatum
intro: Leucanthemum auriculatum, also known as the auriculated daisy, is a plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Leucanthemum auriculatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Leucanthemum auriculatum can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
